```esql
FROM mmr_text_vector_keyword
| SORT keyword_field
| LIMIT 10
| MMR [0.1, 0.2, 0.3] ON text_vector LIMIT 3 WITH { "lambda": 0.1 }
| DROP text_vector, byte_vector, bit_vector
```

| keyword_field:keyword | text_body:text |
| --- | --- |
| test3 | third text |
| test6 | sixth text |
| test8 | eighth text |
